models.noLibraryMatch: No official models match your query
models.selectVersionDesc: Select a tag version to download

toast.downloadAlreadyQueuedDesc: {{name}} already has an active download task
toast.residentEnabledDesc: {{name}} will stay in memory until manually unloaded

models.transfersEmptyDescription: Start a download from the catalog to monitor real-time progress here.

models.transfersNoActive: No active transfers at this time.
models.transferHistoryDescription: History of completed and terminated tasks is preserved for your reference.

chat.title: Chat History
chat.selectOrCreate: Select a conversation or create a new one
chat.webSearchTitle: When enabled, run a web search before sending and inject results
chat.webSearchUnsupportedTitle: Current model does not declare `tools` capability; web search is unavailable
chat.toggleThinkingTitle: Toggle whether reasoning output is shown
chat.gptOssThinkingTitle: Ollama docs: gpt-oss supports low/medium/high thinking levels
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message... Supports Markdown, LaTeX ($...$), code blocks
chat.rememberSwitch: Also save to memory (Shift+Enter for newline, Enter to send)
chat.attachmentHintVisual: Multimodal: Supports images, PDF, and text file uploads.
chat.attachmentHintTextOnly: Current model supports text document attachments only.
chat.emptyDescription: Choose a model and send your first instruction to explore the infinite possibilities of AI.
chat.deleteConfirmDescription: This action will permanently remove this dialogue and all history. It cannot be undone.
chat.deleteAllConfirmDescription: This will wipe all historical dialogues from your storage. Proceed with caution.

promptTemplates.conclusionFirst: Give the conclusion first, then explain step by step.
promptTemplates.runnableExample: Provide a runnable code example and explain the key points.
promptTemplates.compareTable: Use a table to compare pros and cons of these options.
promptTemplates.reproSteps: Give minimal reproducible steps and a troubleshooting order.
promptTemplates.threeOptions: Provide 3 options and sort them by cost from low to high.
promptTemplates.chineseWithEnglishTerms: Answer in Chinese while keeping English technical terms.

noModel.title: No available model detected
noModel.description: Download at least one model on the Models page first

toast.noModelBeforeSend: Download a model before sending messages

modelNotChatCapable.title: Current model is not chat-capable
modelNotChatCapable.description: Chat window supports LLMs only. Switch to a chat-capable model in the selector.

webSearchUnavailable.title: Web search unavailable
webSearchUnavailable.description: Current model does not support tools. Switch to a model with tools capability.

attachmentImageNotSupported.title: Image attachments are not supported
attachmentImageNotSupported.description: Switch to a model with visual input support before uploading images.

attachmentUnsupported.title: Unsupported attachment type
attachmentUnsupported.description: {{name}} is not a supported upload type.

downloads.title: Download Manager
downloads.subtitle: View and manage model download tasks
downloads.noTasksHint: Go to the Models page to start downloading
downloads.clearHistoryConfirm: Terminated task history will be removed. Active downloads will continue. Proceed?
downloads.finalizingHint: Validating layers and finalizing resources. One moment...
downloads.convergedDescription: The Transfer Center is now integrated into the Models section for unified lifecycle management.
downloads.transferCenterDescription: We’ve unified download tracking and model assets to provide a more consistent end-to-end experience.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure ModelForge parameters
settings.enableMemoryDesc: Auto use embedding model for memory retrieval; auto-disable when no embedding available
settings.embeddingModelPlaceholder: e.g. nomic-embed-text:latest; leave empty for auto-detect
settings.embeddingModelDesc: Leave empty to auto-detect; specify to use a preferred model
settings.maxOutputTokensDesc: Default max output length for chat. Range: 128 - 262144.
settings.maxContextTokensDesc: Controls model context window (Ollama num_ctx). Range: 512 - 1048576.
settings.autoUnloadDesc: Automatically unload models; resident models are excluded
settings.verboseStatsDesc: Show token count, speed, and duration below each response
settings.smartRecommendDesc: Automatically recommend models based on your hardware
settings.autoLoadModelDesc: Automatically load the conversation's model when entering chat
settings.idleTimeoutDesc: Auto-unload models after this idle period, 0 = never
settings.computerUseDesc: Configure default desktop automation behavior and access scope in one place
settings.computerUseExecutionModeDesc: These defaults are applied to new Computer Use tasks so the task page stays less cramped.
settings.computerUseCustomScopeDesc: When enabled, new tasks use the working directory and allowed paths configured here.
settings.embeddingAutoDisabled: No embedding model detected, auto disabled
settings.welcomeGuideDesc: Open the quick first-launch guide again.
settings.quickControlsDesc: Keep theme, language, runtime defaults, and onboarding close so the controls you touch most stay together.
settings.statusSummaryDesc: Quickly check connection health, memory, and desktop automation defaults.

onboarding.title: Welcome to ModelForge
onboarding.subtitle: Discover the essential workflows and efficient entry points in less than a minute.
onboarding.skipHint: You can always restart this guide from the Configuration Center.

welcome.title: Welcome to ModelForge
welcome.description: The ultimate full-stack AI workstation on your desktop. We'll set up the optimized local LLM environment for a seamless chat and automation experience.
points: One interface to unify all your local computing resources.
Seamless integration of web search and semantic memory.
Autonomous Desktop Agency via natural language (Computer Use).
Privacy First: All data remains securely on your local device.

ollama.title: Initialize Local Environment
ollama.description: ModelForge relies on Ollama for local execution. If not detected, we will automatically download and install the service in the background.
points: The app auto-detects system dependencies and completes configuration.
Real-time progress is provided; click Next once the environment is ready.
Select 'Continue in Background' to explore while the setup finishes.

features.title: Discover the Capabilities
features.description: From high-fidelity dialogue to desktop automation, ModelForge provides a professional toolchain for the local LLM era.
points: Chat: Multimodal attachments, LaTeX supports, and RAG memory.
Automation: Let agents handle desktop tasks and repetitive workflows.
Model Library: Browse, download, and manage Ollama models with ease.
Telemetry: Real-time VRAM monitoring and custom execution policies.

finish.title: Start Your AI Journey
finish.description: Everything is ready. Now you can explore models, realize your ideas in chat, or let the agent handle the heavy lifting for you.
points: First time? Visit the Models page to download Qwen or DeepSeek.
Grant permissions when prompted to ensure smooth automation.
Restart this guide anytime from the Settings page.

onboarding.quickActionsDescription: Jump straight into a page from here, or close the guide and explore on your own.

ollama.installingStatus: Waiting to install or currently installing
ollama.installInBackground: The install is running in the background. You can keep exploring the app while it finishes.
ollama.installStatusHint: If installation has not started yet, we will try to launch it automatically on this step.
ollama.healthWaiting: Waiting for Ollama to become ready
ollama.installCommandDescription: We try to start the installation automatically. If your system shows a terminal or security prompt, follow it to continue. The matching install command is also shown below in case you want to run it yourself.
ollama.installStartedBackground: The install will continue in the background while you explore the app.
ollama.installStartedForeground: The install command has started. Follow the system prompt to finish the setup.
ollama.installFailedDescription: Automatic install could not be started. Try again later or use the official download page.

recommend.title: Start with one ready-to-use model
recommend.description: We recommend qwen3.5:4b by default because it is a better first-run balance of size and responsiveness.
recommend.downloadStartedDescription: We started pulling {{model}}. You can keep using the app and check the models page later for progress.
recommend.downloadFailedDescription: There was a problem starting the recommended model download. Please try again.

thinking.disclaimer: The content above is the model's internal reasoning process showing how it analyzed the problem step by step.
thinking.noThinkingText: No explicit thinking text. Tool execution summary is shown.

home.title: Dashboard
home.subtitle: View model assets, service health, and system load in one place, then jump to key actions quickly.
home.noConversationHint: No conversation history yet. Go to Chat and create your first conversation.

ocrBanner.title: Computer Use requires OCR
ocrBanner.description: Install OCR before your first run or desktop understanding will stay unavailable.

permissionBanner.title: Computer Use desktop permissions are not ready
permissionBanner.description: Enable Screen Recording and Accessibility first.

chat.title: Open Chat
chat.description: Jump into chat and start generating with a model

models.title: Manage Models
models.description: View local models, runtime state, and residency settings

downloads.title: View Transfers
downloads.description: Follow the download queue, speeds, and finalization inside Models

settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: Check Ollama connection and runtime parameters

realtime.title: Realtime Status
realtime.description: Summary of downloads, services, and hardware usage
realtime.backendFailed: Check logs in the Settings page

home.workspaceDescription: Check readiness, resume the last useful context, and surface one clear next step instead of making you scan the whole app.
home.nextBestActionDescription: Show one clear action first so the workflow keeps moving.
home.continueNothing: You do not have anything in progress yet. Start from Chat, Computer Use, or Models.
home.quickEntryDescription: Keep the core entry points close so you can do work instead of hunting through the app.

recommendedAction.fixOllamaDescription: Ollama is not ready. Fix that first so the rest of the product becomes usable again.
recommendedAction.getFirstModelDescription: Install a model first so chat and automation can start working.
recommendedAction.startChatDescription: The system is ready. Jump back into everyday chat.

computerUse.title: Computer Use
computerUse.subtitle: Hand a goal to the model, let it work on the desktop, and keep the full task history in one place.
computerUse.desktopOnlyDescription: Computer Use is currently available in the desktop app only. In the browser you can view status, but you cannot start tasks.
computerUse.ocrRequiredDescription: Before the first task can start, Computer Use needs screen-reading support. Install an Ollama OCR model or use a local OCR engine.
computerUse.videoRouteDescription: The current model {{model}} can understand the screen directly, so Computer Use will use direct visual reading first.
computerUse.visionUsesOcrDescription: The current model {{model}} cannot read the screen directly, so Computer Use will rely on OCR before it continues.
computerUse.ocrReadyDescription: Screen content can already be read, so Computer Use is ready to start.
computerUse.permissionDescription: Turn on Screen Recording and Accessibility first. Without them, the model cannot read the screen or control apps for you.
computerUse.taskPanelDescription: Pick a model, describe the goal, and start the task. Common defaults now live in Settings so this page can stay focused.
computerUse.setupDescription: Choose a model, describe what you want done, then start the task. The task flow will continue on the right.
computerUse.overviewScopeEmpty: There are no folders in the current scope yet.
computerUse.noToolModel: No model with declared tools capability is currently available for Computer Use.
computerUse.goalPlaceholder: For example: open the browser, visit a page, read the content, and summarize it.
computerUse.approvalModeDescription: Choose how task confirmations should be handled by default.
computerUse.approvalModeHandsFreeHint: Keeps normal steps moving and only stops for sensitive input, terminal commands, or file changes.
computerUse.approvalModeHandsFreeNotice: In hands-free mode, ModelForge stays out of the way and only comes back when it needs you.
computerUse.approvalModeReviewAllHint: Stops before every desktop action so you can review each step.
computerUse.settingsCardDescription: Default execution behavior and access scope live in Settings so the task page can stay focused.
computerUse.allowedPathsHint: Defaults include the working directory, Desktop, and Downloads, and you can add extra folders when needed.
computerUse.noAllowedPaths: There are no extra allowlisted folders yet.
computerUse.pickerUnavailable: Finder folder selection is unavailable here, so Computer Use will fall back to manual path entry.
computerUse.scopeAutoDescription: Computer Use starts with a default access scope automatically. Most tasks do not need manual paths.
computerUse.scopeCustomHint: Only change this when the task truly needs other folders.
computerUse.historyDescription: Previous tasks stay here like conversation history. You can resume from them or carry their context into the next task.
computerUse.deleteAllConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. All Computer Use tasks, screenshots, and approval records will be permanently removed.
computerUse.noHistory: There is no task history yet.
computerUse.contextFromPrevious: This task inherited context from a previous task
computerUse.nextTaskContext: The next task will inherit this context
computerUse.activeSessionHint: A task is already in progress. Return to it, or stop it, before starting another one.
computerUse.screenPanelDescription: See the latest screenshot, a short screen summary, and what the model is noticing right now.
computerUse.conversationDescription: The goal, observations, actions, and results all stay in one continuous task thread.
computerUse.readyTitle: Start a task from the left
computerUse.readyDescription: Choose a model, describe the goal, and start the task. Everything that follows will continue here.
computerUse.readyStepGoal: A clear goal makes the task more reliable.
computerUse.readyStepPermissions: Finish desktop permissions first before starting tasks that interact with apps.
computerUse.readyStepStart: When you're ready, start the task and the rest of the work will continue here.
computerUse.resultsEmpty: Files, links, and screenshots from the task will appear here.

templates.landingPageGoal: Create a clear, visually clean single-page webpage and save the final file into the current working directory.
templates.docsSummaryGoal: Open the target document or webpage, extract the key information, and produce a structured Chinese summary.
templates.fileOrganizeGoal: Inspect files in the current working directory, organize or rename them by topic or type, and summarize the final structure.
templates.browserResearchGoal: Open the browser, inspect the target page, collect the important information and links, and give a concise report.

computerUse.timelineDescription: Follow the task step by step, including key actions, results, and anything that needs approval.
computerUse.noToolDetails: There are no extra details for this step.
computerUse.noTimeline: Actions and approvals will appear here after the session starts.
computerUse.approvalDialogDescription: This step needs your confirmation before the task can continue.
computerUse.approvalEditLabel: You can edit this step before approving it (JSON)
computerUse.sessionCompletedSummary: This task is complete. Outputs and artifacts stay attached to the session.
computerUse.sessionLiveSummary: This task is still in progress. New actions, output, and results will keep appearing here.

memory.title: Memory Management
memory.subtitle: Manage long-term context and knowledge with fast semantic retrieval
memory.emptySearchHint: No semantically relevant memory matched your query. Try fewer keywords or rephrase.
memory.emptyHint: The system accumulates long-term knowledge during chats. You can also manually add team norms and project context.

addDialog.title: Add New Memory
addDialog.description: Manually inject long-term context or custom knowledge
addDialog.contentPlaceholder: e.g. The project stack is React and FastAPI...

embeddingDialog.title: Memory is missing an embedding model
embeddingDialog.description: Memory module checked local models and found no usable embedding model. Download the recommended one now?

gptoss.title: GPT-OSS Assistant
gptoss.subtitle: Open-source reasoning model
gptoss.systemPrompt:
You are GPT-OSS, an AI assistant with access to the current world.
Current time: {{currentTime}}
You can use tools to access real-time information when needed.
Format mathematical expressions using LaTeX: $...$ for inline, $$...$$ for display.
gptoss.inputPlaceholder: Type a message... Supports LaTeX ($...$) and code blocks
gptoss.enterHint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline

workspace.subtitle: Bring system readiness, recent work, and the next best action into one continuous workspace.

chat.subtitle: Immersive AI chat workflow with integrated model and history management.

settings.subtitle: Configure application preferences, core parameters, and system policies.

status.activeTransfersDetail: Background transfers are running; monitor progress in the Models section.
status.readyToResumeDetail: Automatically restore your previous session and context.
status.systemReadyDetail: Core services are active, integrating all your tasks and resources.
status.chatIdleDetail: Easily access your history or start a new conversation instantly.
status.noActiveTaskDetail: Everything is set; start a new computer automation task anytime.
status.loadedModelsDetail: Real-time view of resident models and computing resource allocation.
status.catalogReadyDetail: A single entry for model discovery, installation, and management.
